creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
i thought it's just me if i looked how i could implement it and found it hard. i never do that too. tunable was quite easy to add

that new flag, could it be "-R" maybe, i see that being free

i could get and see if commit logs show somebody implementing it and follow that maybe. and this needs loader modifications? might take extra 10 years or so. but noone wanted it before so no hurry

when i talked about this and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=283429 in #bsdmips in ~2014, noone seemed to care nor were interested. so i'll see what i could do here
